creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/emulators/qemu-guest-agent/pkg-descr?id=c47779eeeac73dcfcb52402d4a12e455695ccd4d#n3>: 

> Port homepage https://github.com/aborche/qemu-guest-agent

At the GitHub page: 

> QEMU Guest Agent patched for FreeBSD

– this might be a better description for the port. 

Plus, change the WWW 
from http://wiki.qemu.org/Main_Page
to   https://github.com/aborche/qemu-guest-agent

----


If a link to the QEMU wiki (or home page <https://www.qemu.org/>) is required, it might be made from the README. 

README <https://github.com/aborche/qemu-guest-agent/blob/master/README.md> already includes a link out to <https://github.com/qemu/qemu/blob/master/qga/qapi-schema.json>, with the phrase: 

> … guest agent …

– so (a nit) maybe change the COMMENT for the port
  from QEMU guest-agent utilities
  to   QEMU guest agent utilities

– without the hyphen.
